banner.text: New: Premium Next.js websites delivered in 3 weeks — Jerusalem × Paris

hero.subheadline: Custom-built Next.js websites, exceptional design, and uncompromising performance for ambitious brands.

stats.tagline: Jerusalem × Paris — Digital design & development studio

services.label: Services
services.web_desc: Custom, high-performance SEO-optimised websites. Next.js, WordPress, Framer.
services.ui_desc: Interfaces designed for user experience and conversion.
services.branding_desc: Logo, visual guidelines, design system — a coherent and memorable identity.
services.strategy_desc: Social media, content, positioning — a presence that drives results.
services.ecommerce_desc: Shopify and WooCommerce stores optimised for conversion and customer experience.
services.seo_desc: Technical audits, Core Web Vitals and organic search to dominate Google.
services.mobile_desc: React Native and PWA for smooth, high-performance mobile experiences.
services.maintenance_desc: Monthly monitoring, security updates and premium hosting for your peace of mind.

process.subtitle: 3 weeks from brief to launch — no surprises.
process.step1_desc: Brief, audit, goals and project scope.
process.step2_desc: Figma mockups validated before any development.

ai.headline_start: The AI we use. The one we build
ai.body: We don't just use AI in our production — we can design and integrate AI features directly into your product: chatbot, content generation, automation, recommendations.
ai.cta_subtitle: We review your case for free

items.quote: UCY Studio transformed our digital presence. The site they delivered exceeded all our expectations — in timing, quality, and impact.
items.author: Sarah M.

items.quote: A team that truly understands brand challenges. Our visual identity is now consistent across all our materials.
items.author: David L.

items.quote: The dashboard UCY designed changed the way our teams work. Flawless UX, delivered in 3 weeks.
items.author: Marc R.

items.quote: Our design system is now the internal reference for all our product teams. Remarkable work.
items.author: Léa K.

about.label: About
about.body: Between Jerusalem and Paris, we craft visual identities and digital experiences that set our clients apart.
